name: qualia-v4-ghost-node
description: A node whose pointer status is 'missing' should render visually dimmed with a '[missing]' badge on its label.

commands: window.__canaryAddPointer({ nodeId: 'ghost-1', kind: 'file', path: 'does-not-exist.md', role: 'markdown', status: 'missing' })

checkpoints.name: ghost-label-badge
checkpoints.description: Find the node labeled 'Ghost Node' in the 3D viewport. Pass ONLY if both: (1) the label text 'Ghost Node' is immediately followed by a red-colored '[missing]' badge (small, parenthetical-style annotation), AND (2) the node sphere itself looks visually dimmed / darker compared to other unrelated nodes â€” about 35% of the brightness it would have if its pointer were live. Fail if the [missing] badge is absent, is the wrong color (e.g. theme accent instead of red), or if the node sphere doesn't appear dimmed.
